---
title: "Essays"
subtitle: "Long-form writing on place, economy, and environment."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, categories, reading-time]
  date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
page-layout: full
---
